title: EndraQuest Tweaks
description: Fixes LevelZ skill requirement bypass bugs, prevents Ancient Debris duplication, and limits mob farming exploits.
body:
LevelZ Fixes - A collection of bug fixes for LevelZ mod compatibility issues.

## Features

- **Accessories Equipment Fix**: Prevents bypassing LevelZ skill requirements when right-clicking Artifacts items into Accessories slots. All 48 Artifacts items are validated before equipment.

- **Ancient Debris Duplication Fix**: Prevents infinite duplication of Ancient Debris by blocking LevelZ mining drop chance bonus from being applied to it.

- **Mob Farm Limiter**: Limits mob farming by tracking kills within a 3x3 chunk area. Once the limit is reached, further kills in that area won't grant experience or drops.

**NOTE: This mod was originally created for the "EndraQuest" mod pack and may not be suitable for general use outside of that specific mod pack configuration.**
